assessment.name: NovaCart Data Analyst Simulation
assessment.context: NovaCart is one of India's growing e-commerce platforms, serving over 1.2 million monthly users and processing nearly 35,000 orders every day. Over the past quarter, revenue has declined by 18%, while customer complaints have increased by 12%. The cause is unclear. You are a Junior Data Analyst and your job is to investigate.

missions.title: Mission 1: CEO Escalation
missions.context:
Welcome to NovaCart. Today is your first day as a Junior Data Analyst. NovaCart is one of India's growing e-commerce platforms, serving over 1.2 million monthly users and processing nearly 35,000 orders every day.

Over the past quarter, the leadership team has noticed a concerning trend: revenue has declined by 18%, while customer complaints have increased by 12%. The cause is unclear.

The CEO has requested the Analytics Team to determine where the investigation should begin. Your first responsibility is to frame the problem correctly before collecting additional evidence.

tasks.question: The Analytics Manager has identified four possible areas to investigate. Arrange them in order from Highest Priority to Lowest Priority.
Before beginning the investigation, determine which information would be most valuable. Select the THREE most important pieces of information.
The CEO asks: "What should we focus on understanding first?" Choose the most effective response.
options: Determine which department is responsible for the decline.
Identify which customer groups, products, or behaviors contributed most to the revenue decline.
Reduce operational expenses until revenue improves.
Launch a new acquisition campaign immediately.
tasks.correctAnswer: Identify which customer groups, products, or behaviors contributed most to the revenue decline.

missions.title: Mission 2: Dashboard Analysis
missions.context:
The Analytics Team has prepared a summary dashboard comparing the previous quarter with the current quarter.

Dashboard Summary:
• Revenue: ₹12.4M → ₹10.2M
• Orders: 152,000 → 149,000
• Website Visits: 2.1M → 2.0M
• Conversion Rate: 7.2% → 5.1%

Leadership wants to understand where performance changed before further investigation begins.

tasks.question: Review the dashboard. Which metric shows the largest performance decline?
Based on the dashboard, which statement is best supported by the data?
options: Revenue declined primarily because the number of orders doubled.
Customer conversion efficiency decreased significantly despite relatively stable traffic.
tasks.correctAnswer: Customer conversion efficiency decreased significantly despite relatively stable traffic.

tasks.question: Your manager asks: "Which metric should we investigate next to better understand the revenue decline?"
You need to provide a brief summary to leadership. Choose the strongest conclusion.
options: Traffic is the primary issue affecting revenue.
The dashboard suggests that fewer visitors are completing purchases, making conversion performance a key area for investigation.
Revenue decline appears unrelated to customer behavior.
Additional marketing spend should be approved immediately.
tasks.correctAnswer: The dashboard suggests that fewer visitors are completing purchases, making conversion performance a key area for investigation.

missions.title: Mission 3: Segment Investigation
missions.context:
The Analytics Team has segmented customer conversion performance to determine where the decline is occurring.

Segment Performance Summary:
• New Customers: 5.4% → 5.1%
• Returning Customers: 9.2% → 8.8%
• Premium Customers: 11.8% → 11.4%
• Mobile App Users: 8.5% → 4.7%

Leadership wants to identify which segment requires immediate investigation.

tasks.question: Based on the segment performance data, which customer segment should the Analytics Team investigate first?
You can investigate only one area at a time. Arrange the following investigation areas from highest priority to lowest priority.
Review the observations below and select the ones that represent STRONG evidence for the investigation.
options: Mobile conversion rate decreased from 8.5% to 4.7%
Premium customer conversion remained relatively stable
Revenue decline is concentrated within one customer segment
correctAnswer: Mobile conversion rate decreased from 8.5% to 4.7%
Revenue decline is concentrated within one customer segment

missions.title: Mission 4: Delivery Investigation
missions.context:
The Operations Team has shared delivery performance metrics after concerns were raised regarding mobile app customer experience.

Delivery Performance Dashboard:
• On-Time Delivery Rate: 94% → 81%
• Average Delivery Time: 2.1 Days → 3.8 Days
• Delivery Complaints: 1,250 → 3,420
• Order Cancellation Rate: 4% → 11%

Review the operational data and identify whether delivery issues may be affecting customer behavior.

tasks.question: Which operational metric provides the strongest indication that customer experience may be deteriorating?
Select the TWO observations that most strongly support investigating delivery performance further.
options: On-Time Delivery Rate dropped from 94% to 81%
correctAnswer: On-Time Delivery Rate dropped from 94% to 81%

tasks.question: Based on the delivery data, how confident are you (0–100) that delivery performance issues are a primary driver of the conversion decline?

missions.title: Mission 5: Customer Voice Analysis
missions.context:
The Customer Experience Team has provided recent customer feedback collected through surveys and support tickets.

Customer Feedback:
• Customer 1: "My order arrived four days later than promised."
• Customer 2: "Delivery updates were inaccurate and confusing."
• Customer 3: "I cancelled my order because it was taking too long."
• Customer 4: "Product quality was good, but shipping was extremely slow."
• Customer 5: "Checkout process was smooth."

Review the feedback and identify recurring themes.

tasks.question: Which TWO themes appear most frequently in the customer feedback?
Leadership has requested immediate actions. Rank the following actions from highest priority to lowest priority.
Write a one-sentence summary of the key customer concern that should be escalated to operations leadership.

missions.title: Mission 6: Data Quality Audit
missions.context:
Before the Analytics Team presents findings to leadership, a Data Governance Analyst notices inconsistencies in the delivery performance reports.

Delivery Report Extract:
• ORD-1001: 3 days — Delivered
• ORD-1002: N/A days — Delivered
• ORD-1003: 5 days — Delivered
• ORD-1004: -2 days — Delivered
• ORD-1005: 4 days — Cancelled

You have been asked to review the data and identify potential quality issues.

tasks.question: Which records indicate potential data quality issues?
Before presenting findings to leadership, what should the Analytics Team do?
options: Validate and clean questionable records before finalizing conclusions.
tasks.correctAnswer: Validate and clean questionable records before finalizing conclusions.

tasks.question: Write a brief note to the Data Governance team explaining why data quality matters for this investigation.

missions.title: Mission 7: Stakeholder Conflict
missions.context:
Following the investigation, several department leaders have proposed actions. Due to limited resources, leadership can only prioritize a small number of initiatives this quarter.

Stakeholder Requests:
• Operations Team: Improve delivery performance and logistics processes.
• Marketing Team: Increase acquisition campaigns to drive more traffic.
• Product Team: Redesign parts of the mobile app experience.
• Finance Team: Reduce operational spending.

Review the proposals and determine the most effective response.

tasks.question: Rank the following initiatives from highest priority to lowest priority based on the investigation findings.
Which stakeholder recommendation is most strongly supported by the investigation?
You have 100 project points available. How many points would you allocate to Improve Delivery Performance (0–100)?
Which recommendation should be presented to leadership?
options: Prioritize delivery performance improvements before pursuing growth initiatives.
Reduce operating costs across all departments.
Delay all action until the next quarter.
tasks.correctAnswer: Prioritize delivery performance improvements before pursuing growth initiatives.

missions.title: Mission 8: Executive Decision
missions.context:
The CEO and leadership team have requested a final recommendation. You have completed the investigation and validated the findings.

Key Investigation Findings:
• Revenue decreased by 18%
• Conversion rate declined from 7.2% to 5.1%
• Mobile App Users showed the largest decline in conversion (8.5% → 4.7%)
• On-Time Delivery Rate dropped from 94% to 81%
• Delivery complaints increased significantly (1,250 → 3,420)
• Customer feedback highlighted delays and poor delivery communication
• Data quality checks confirmed the findings

Your task is to summarize the key issue and recommend the most appropriate business action.

tasks.question: Which summary best reflects the investigation findings?
options: Revenue declined primarily because website traffic decreased significantly.
The investigation indicates that delivery performance issues are contributing to lower conversion rates among Mobile App Users.
The investigation indicates that product quality concerns are driving customer dissatisfaction.
The investigation was unable to identify a likely cause.
tasks.correctAnswer: The investigation indicates that delivery performance issues are contributing to lower conversion rates among Mobile App Users.

tasks.question: Arrange the following actions in the order they should be implemented.
Which recommendation should be presented to the CEO?
options: Reduce logistics investment to lower costs.
Prioritize resolving delivery performance issues before investing in growth initiatives.
Delay all business actions until additional data becomes available.
tasks.correctAnswer: Prioritize resolving delivery performance issues before investing in growth initiatives.

tasks.question: Write a brief executive recommendation (maximum 150 characters) that could be shared with leadership summarizing the root cause and next steps.
